prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-5MM2ESCKCG-ES-GRN Product Type: CARABINER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 5mm 2" Extra Small Carabiner Key Chain - Green Description: Keep your sporting goods and fitness equipment handy with the ASR Outdoor Extra Small Aluminum Carabiner.

Attach one to your backpack, water bottle, keys or purse to keep things handy and organized.

These carabiners are constructed of durable aluminum and come with a key ring for easy attachment to just about anything.

Make sure to grab a few of these to keep around the house, your office or outdoor gear.

Please note: these carabiners are NOT FOR CLIMBING. Search Terms: carabiner carbiner clilp carabiner keychain camping accessories camping gear camping essentials camping tents and shelters camping supplies camping backpack hiking backpack hiking gear hiking poles Features: - Dimensions of XS Carabiner: 2" x 5mm - Material: Aluminum - Color: Green - Great for Hiking, Camping, Backpacks, Key Chains & Everyday Use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2" Extra Small Green Carabiner Keychain

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-in 5mm Green Extra Small Carabiner Key Chain

anthropic.title_differentiation: Aluminum Construction, Durable, Key Ring Attached, Hiking And Camping Gear, Backpack And Purse Clip

openai.title_differentiation: Aluminum Build, Key Ring Attachment, Backpack And Keychain Use, Compact 2-Inch Size, Not For Climbing
